title: Remote Engineering Excellence: How to Build, Manage, and Motivate Your Team
subTitle: A Feishu CMS-backed preview of the existing Ramping Up blog experience for developer-facing content.
seoTitle: Remote Engineering Excellence | Feishu CMS Preview
seoDescription: A preview article rendered through the Feishu blog adapter, aligned with the current Nuxt detail page contract.
seoTag: remote engineering, hiring, management, feishu cms
contentHtml:
Whether you're a CEO trying to attract top talent, a CTO aiming to streamline project management, or a founder building a strong company culture, the mechanics of a high-performing remote engineering team matter.

This demo keeps your current blog page contract intact while swapping the source behind it. In a real rollout, the metadata would live in Feishu Base and the body would come from Feishu Docs.

The result is a writing workflow your team already understands, without forcing a full rebuild of the Nuxt frontend.

title: Global Payroll Checklist for Fast-Scaling Teams
subTitle: A sample employer-facing entry showing how editorial metadata and body content can be served from a Feishu-style CMS layer.
seoTitle: Global Payroll Checklist | Feishu CMS Preview
seoDescription: Employer-facing content previewed through the Feishu adapter with the same response shape as the current Ramping Up blog API.
seoTag: global payroll, employer, operations, feishu cms
contentHtml:
Scaling global payroll is rarely blocked by writing code. More often, it is blocked by fragmented operations, inconsistent contract data, and no single editorial source of truth.

In the Feishu CMS setup, those structured fields can live in Base while the long-form explanation, SOP notes, and policy comments live in Docs.

That gives your website team a clean API and your operations team a familiar editing surface.

title: Migrating a Nuxt Blog to a Feishu CMS Workflow
subTitle: A technical preview of the exact integration path recommended for the current RampingUpWebsite project.
seoTitle: Migrating a Nuxt Blog to Feishu CMS
seoDescription: Technical preview article for the Feishu-backed blog adapter and migration path.
contentHtml:
Your current blog frontend already expects an API for list and detail pages. That is why Feishu is a good fit here: we can keep the Nuxt pages and replace only the content source.

In the first phase, the adapter can serve HTML from imported content or embedded doc links. In the second phase, it can fetch Feishu Doc blocks and render richer article layouts.

This preview is intentionally small, but it demonstrates the exact cutover shape the production site can use.
